name: io.github.kapruka/reviewguru
description: Query 2,200+ Sri Lankan businesses + 1,000 doctors + 3,800+ reviews from Claude Desktop, Cursor, Cline, or any MCP-aware AI agent. Backed by reviewguru.lk's public API; no API key required.

environmentVariables.description: Override the Review Guru API base URL. Defaults to https://reviewguru.lk — only set this when pointing at a fork or staging environment.
environmentVariables.name: REVIEWGURU_API
